design_philosophy: Editorial, cinematic, and sophisticated. Emphasizing Dubai's luxury real estate through large-scale photography, generous whitespace, asymmetrical grids, and refined typography. Avoid generic SaaS visuals, purple/teal gradients, or typical real estate grid layouts.

rules: Tint greys slightly with warmth to match the gold accents.
Never use full-screen color gradients. Use grain or noise textures instead.
Hover states on dark must shift to a slightly lighter grey or illuminate the border.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines MUST be uppercase, tiny (text-xs), and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
Maximum heading size: text-6xl (fluid). Do not use text-7xl+.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical templates.
layout_and_spacing.scale: p-12, p-16, p-24 for section paddings.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grid protocol. Mix 3+ shapes (Hero, Square, Tall, Filler) for asymmetry. Grid items MUST be direct children.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and paragraphs.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use 'Grid Borders' (The Technical Look) or 'Crystal Glassmorphism' for structure. Thin 1px borders (border-border/40).

header.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/70 border-b border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0

hero.style: Photography-first with subtle Ken-Burns zoom. Maximum dark overlay bg-black/40.

cards.style: Cardless or flat rectangles. Subtle 1px borders. NO heavy drop shadows. Sharp or slightly rounded corners (max rounded-sm).

forms.style: Editorial inputs. Use Shadcn customized components. Thin bottom borders or minimalist rectangles. No native browser inputs.

charts.style: Shadcn charts (recharts). Accessible, using primary gold and neutral greys. Minimalist grid lines.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling recommended for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle parallax for images. Staggered fade-up for lists. Framer motion 3D transforms for hover states (slight lift/rotate).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have high contrast (gold ring).

pages_and_features.home: Hero with slideshow (Ken-Burns), About Us summary, Latest Launches (Cards), Top Communities, Team slider, Google Reviews, Popups for new launches. REMOVE generic services grid.
pages_and_features.about_us: Journey timeline, Founders and Team with high-end portrait layouts and social links.
pages_and_features.projects: Floating hot launches. Off-plan properties grid with advanced search + filters. Detailed inner pages (Gallery, Floor Plan, Amenities, Map, Payment Plan, Comparative Analysis, History). Brochure download form.
pages_and_features.comparative_analysis: Market data visualization. Data-heavy but styled minimally using grid borders.
pages_and_features.experience_gallery: Immersive image masonry or bento layout. Large lightboxes.
pages_and_features.blogs: Editorial layout, magazine-like typography, large feature images.
pages_and_features.careers: Refined layout for open positions and company culture.
pages_and_features.contact: Map integration (dark mode map style preferred), sophisticated contact form, social links.

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for a high-end luxury feel.
media.rules: NEVER use placeholder services (e.g., via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs or random unsplash sources.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Build pages in .js/.jsx (NOT .tsx). 2. Use Shadcn components for forms/data, but custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. 3. Ensure the aesthetic is distinctly dark-hybrid with gold accents. No purple. No generic templates.
